Safety FirstCall Us
Our Services

Comprehensive Drilling & Construction

From groundwater exploration to civil construction, we deliver end-to-end solutions with precision, safety, and excellence.

Service 01

Borehole Drilling

Expert DTH (Down-The-Hole) drilling technology with depths up to 350m. Geological sampling at 1m intervals with yield estimation.

  • DTH Technology with high compressed air
  • Variable hole sizes per client requirements
  • Geological rock samples at 1m intervals
  • Aquifer strike and water rest level recording
  • Yield estimation for individual aquifers
Service 02

Groundwater Exploration

Comprehensive hydrogeological surveys using ABEM Terrameter SAS 1000 and PQWT S-300 ERT technology.

  • Electrical Resistivity Tomography (ERT)
  • Identification of shallow and deep aquifers
  • Site assessment by qualified geologists
  • Detailed technical reports
  • Optimal drilling point recommendations
Service 03

Civil & Building Construction

Full-spectrum construction services including water supply projects, irrigation schemes, buildings, roads, and dams.

  • Water supply treatment plants and pipelines
  • Irrigation scheme construction
  • Building and road construction
  • Dam construction
  • Underground and raised water tanks
Service 04

Dewatering Services

Specialized dewatering for mining and construction sites including well point systems, deep wells, and sump pumping.

  • Well point systems for sandy soil
  • Deep well dewatering around mine pits
  • Sump pumping for temporary works
  • Submersible pumps up to 100,000 L/hr
  • Experienced at Bulyanhulu Gold Mine
Service 05

Diamond & RC Drilling

Precision exploration drilling with RC rigs up to 450m and diamond drilling up to 800m depth for mining operations.

  • Reverse Circulation (RC) drilling to 450m
  • Diamond drilling to 800m depth
  • Blast hole drilling to 40m
  • RAB drilling and probe drilling
  • In-pit RC grade control drilling
Service 06

Irrigation & Water Supply

Complete water infrastructure solutions from feasibility studies to construction of distribution systems.

  • Gravity water supply schemes
  • Piped water supply construction
  • Pump installation and servicing
  • Water treatment solutions
  • Distribution point construction
How We Work

Our Process

01

Site Study

Technical team visits with geologists to identify optimal drilling points using ERT surveys.

02

Drilling

DTH technology drilling with geological sampling at 1m intervals and constant monitoring.

03

Casing & Development

UPVC casing installation, well development, and gravel packing for long-term integrity.

04

Testing & Handover

Step drawdown and constant pumping tests with detailed completion reports.

SEBAConstruction & Drilling

Leading drilling and construction company in Tanzania since 2008. Committed to safety, quality, and timely project delivery.

Safety Certified
